languages.text: "Остается лишь надеяться, что ваш дар, леди-навигатор, укажет траекторию к освобождению. Оплот ксеносов переполнен невежеством и злобой, и мой внутренний хронометр отсчитывает секунды до момента, когда мы сможем, наконец, покинуть сию беспросветную юдоль".

"We can only hope that your gift, Lady Navigator, will plot a trajectory toward liberation. This xenos stronghold is overflowing with ignorance and malice, and my internal chronometer counts down the seconds until we can finally depart this dismal vale."
languages.original_text: "Остается лишь надеяться, что ваш дар, леди-навигатор, укажет траекторию к освобождению. Оплот ксеносов переполнен невежеством и злобой, и мой внутренний хронометр отсчитывает секунды до момента, когда мы сможем, наконец, покинуть сию беспросветную юдоль".

traits.locale_text: "We can only hope that your gift, Lady Navigator, will plot a trajectory toward liberation. This xenos stronghold is overflowing with ignorance and malice, and my internal chronometer counts down the seconds until we can finally depart this dismal vale."

"We can only hope that your gift, Lady Navigator, will plot a trajectory toward liberation. This xenos stronghold is overflowing with ignorance and malice, and my internal chronometer counts down the seconds until we can finally depart this dismal vale."

"We can only hope that your gift, Lady Navigator, will plot a trajectory toward liberation. This xenos stronghold is overflowing with ignorance and malice, and my internal chronometer counts down the seconds until we can finally depart this dismal vale."

"We can only hope that your gift, Lady Navigator, will plot a trajectory toward liberation. This xenos stronghold is overflowing with ignorance and malice, and my internal chronometer counts down the seconds until we can finally depart this dismal vale."

languages.text: «Solo podemos esperar que su don, lady Navegante, trace una trayectoria hacia la libertad. Este fuerte xenos está cargado de ignorancia y malicia, y mi cronómetro interno cuenta los segundos hasta que podamos alejarnos de ese valle funesto».
languages.original_text: "We can only hope that your gift, Lady Navigator, will plot a trajectory toward liberation. This xenos stronghold is overflowing with ignorance and malice, and my internal chronometer counts down the seconds until we can finally depart this dismal vale."

traits.locale_text: «Solo podemos esperar que su don, lady Navegante, trace una trayectoria hacia la libertad. Este fuerte xenos está cargado de ignorancia y malicia, y mi cronómetro interno cuenta los segundos hasta que podamos alejarnos de ese valle funesto».

languages.text: “我们只能寄希望于你的才能了，导航者女士，希望你能为我们规划出一条通往自由的航线。这座异形堡垒充斥着无知与恶意，而我的内部计时器正一秒秒地倒数着，盼望我们最终能离开这令人窒息的绝望之地。”
languages.original_text: "We can only hope that your gift, Lady Navigator, will plot a trajectory toward liberation. This xenos stronghold is overflowing with ignorance and malice, and my internal chronometer counts down the seconds until we can finally depart this dismal vale."

traits.locale_text: “我们只能寄希望于你的才能了，导航者女士，希望你能为我们规划出一条通往自由的航线。这座异形堡垒充斥着无知与恶意，而我的内部计时器正一秒秒地倒数着，盼望我们最终能离开这令人窒息的绝望之地。”

languages.text: "Wir können nur hoffen, Lady Navigator, dass Eure Gabe eine Flugbahn in Richtung Befreiung berechnet. Diese Xenos-Festung strotzt vor Ignoranz und Bosheit, und mein internes Chronometer zählt die Sekunden, bis wir dieses finstere Tal endlich verlassen können."
languages.original_text: "We can only hope that your gift, Lady Navigator, will plot a trajectory toward liberation. This xenos stronghold is overflowing with ignorance and malice, and my internal chronometer counts down the seconds until we can finally depart this dismal vale."

traits.locale_text: "Wir können nur hoffen, Lady Navigator, dass Eure Gabe eine Flugbahn in Richtung Befreiung berechnet. Diese Xenos-Festung strotzt vor Ignoranz und Bosheit, und mein internes Chronometer zählt die Sekunden, bis wir dieses finstere Tal endlich verlassen können."

languages.text: « Nous ne pouvons qu'espérer que votre don nous indique une trajectoire vers la liberté, dame navigatrice. Ce bastion xénos est gangrené par l'ignorance et la malveillance, et mon chronomètre interne compte les secondes en attendant que nous puissions enfin quitter cet antre de perdition. »
languages.original_text: "We can only hope that your gift, Lady Navigator, will plot a trajectory toward liberation. This xenos stronghold is overflowing with ignorance and malice, and my internal chronometer counts down the seconds until we can finally depart this dismal vale."

traits.locale_text: « Nous ne pouvons qu'espérer que votre don nous indique une trajectoire vers la liberté, dame navigatrice. Ce bastion xénos est gangrené par l'ignorance et la malveillance, et mon chronomètre interne compte les secondes en attendant que nous puissions enfin quitter cet antre de perdition. »

languages.text: "Leydi Rotacı, sadece sizin yeteneğinizin kurtuluşa doğru bir rota çizmesini umabiliriz. Bu zeno kalesi, cehalet ve kötülük dolu. İçsel kronometrem, bu kasvetli vadiden nihayet ayrılabileceğimiz saniyeleri sayıyor."
languages.original_text: "We can only hope that your gift, Lady Navigator, will plot a trajectory toward liberation. This xenos stronghold is overflowing with ignorance and malice, and my internal chronometer counts down the seconds until we can finally depart this dismal vale."

traits.locale_text: "Leydi Rotacı, sadece sizin yeteneğinizin kurtuluşa doğru bir rota çizmesini umabiliriz. Bu zeno kalesi, cehalet ve kötülük dolu. İçsel kronometrem, bu kasvetli vadiden nihayet ayrılabileceğimiz saniyeleri sayıyor."

languages.text: 「貴方の贈り物で、航路を解放へと導くことを願うのみです。この異星人の要塞は、無知と悪意で溢れ、私の内部時計は、この悲惨な谷を離れることができる瞬間まで秒数を刻んでいます。」
languages.original_text: "We can only hope that your gift, Lady Navigator, will plot a trajectory toward liberation. This xenos stronghold is overflowing with ignorance and malice, and my internal chronometer counts down the seconds until we can finally depart this dismal vale."

traits.locale_text: 「貴方の贈り物で、航路を解放へと導くことを願うのみです。この異星人の要塞は、無知と悪意で溢れ、私の内部時計は、この悲惨な谷を離れることができる瞬間まで秒数を刻んでいます。」
